name: metal room
hints: Another alien metal room with a sealed display case! Mirror image of the room to the east.
Like room 20, the display case is sealed and dangerous. Don't press any buttons.
MOVE BUTT is FATAL here too. You need a different approach to access the contents.
E=metal tunnel (9). MOVE BUTT=DEATH. Same trap as room 20. Find safe method to open case.

needs: Open display case (must be in room)

notes: Alien metal room with sealed display case. E=metal tunnel (9). MOVE BUTT=DEATH. Same trap as room 20.
